name: Beef and Bay Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the cubed beef with salt and pepper, then coat it in flour.
2. Place the seasoned beef in a casserole dish with the stock.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add the leeks, turnip, carrot, celery, and potatoes to the casserole.
5. Add the bay leaf, thyme, and sugar lump.
6. Continue stewing gently until all ingredients are tender, about 1 hour.
7. Serve with thick crusty bread. Serves 2; leftovers can be frozen for later use.
